ref: Jour: Physical Review, Part C, Nuclear Physics, Vol.110, p.064605 (2024)
title: Experimental study of complete and incomplete fusion reactions for the 16O + 174Yb system

x4freetext: Experimental study of complete and incomplete fusion

x4codes.hlp: Inter-University Accelerator Centre, New Delhi, India

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Physical Review, Part C, Nuclear Physics, Vol.110, p.064605 (2024)

x4codes.hlp: Inter-University Accelerator Centre, New Delhi, India

x4freetext: targets (~0.4-1.0 mg/cm2) were prepared by vacuum
The intensity and energy of backscattered ions
were measured using a semiconductor detector.
A detector calibrated with gamma sources, using
50 Hz pulse for dead time and 152Eu for efficiency.
The beam current on the target was measured by a
Faraday cup and was in the range of ~20 to 25 nA.
